turns.question: Good morning, thank you for coming in today.
turns.answer: Of course, thank you for having me.

turns.question: It's a pleasure to finally meet you in person.
turns.answer: Likewise, I've been looking forward to this.

turns.question: Welcome aboard, we're glad to have you on the team.
turns.answer: Thank you, I'm excited to get started.

turns.question: Good afternoon, I hope your trip here went smoothly.
turns.answer: It did, thank you for asking.

turns.question: Thank you for making time for this meeting.
turns.answer: Not at all, I appreciate you setting it up.

turns.question: Good to see you again, how have you been?
turns.answer: I've been well, thank you -- and yourself?

turns.question: Welcome to the office, can I get you anything?
turns.answer: Just some water would be great, thank you.

turns.question: It's an honor to be working with you on this.
turns.answer: The feeling is mutual, I'm looking forward to it.

turns.question: I hope you found the office without any trouble.
turns.answer: No trouble at all, your directions were very clear.

turns.question: Thank you for your patience, we're ready for you now.
turns.answer: No problem at all, I appreciate you letting me know.

turns.question: Good morning, everyone, thank you all for being on time.
turns.answer: Of course, happy to be here.

turns.question: I trust you had a pleasant flight in?
turns.answer: I did, thank you, it was quite smooth.

turns.question: Welcome, please have a seat wherever is comfortable.
turns.answer: Thank you, this spot looks perfect.

turns.question: I appreciate you accommodating the schedule change.
turns.answer: It wasn't a problem at all, happy to help.

turns.question: Good afternoon, shall we get started?
turns.answer: Yes, whenever you're ready.

turns.question: It's a pleasure to formally introduce myself, I'm the new director.
turns.answer: Pleasure to meet you, I've heard great things.

turns.question: Thank you for reaching out, how can I help you today?
turns.answer: Thank you for taking the call, I appreciate it.

turns.question: I hope everything has been satisfactory so far.
turns.answer: Absolutely, everything has gone smoothly, thank you.

turns.question: Good morning, I hope you're settling in well.
turns.answer: I am, thank you, everyone's been very welcoming.

turns.question: We're delighted to finally close this partnership.
turns.answer: As are we, it's been a pleasure working with you.

turns.question: Thank you for your continued support on this project.
turns.answer: Of course, we're glad to be part of it.

turns.question: I hope the accommodations were to your liking.
turns.answer: They were excellent, thank you for arranging them.

turns.question: Good afternoon, I believe we spoke on the phone earlier.
turns.answer: Yes, it's nice to finally meet in person.

turns.question: Thank you for your flexibility with the timing today.
turns.answer: Not a problem at all, happy to make it work.

turns.question: Welcome back, I trust the conference went well?
turns.answer: It did, thank you, quite a productive trip.

turns.question: I appreciate you taking this meeting on such short notice.
turns.answer: Of course, I understand things came up.

turns.question: Good morning, may I introduce you to the rest of the team?
turns.answer: Please, I'd love to meet everyone.

turns.question: Thank you for your hospitality during our visit.
turns.answer: It was truly our pleasure to host you.

turns.question: I hope you had a restful weekend before the big week ahead.
turns.answer: I did, thank you, feeling ready to dive in.

turns.question: Good afternoon, shall I walk you through the agenda?
turns.answer: Yes, please, that would be very helpful.
